place. The Sun's figure is 10-13-38. Subtracting Moon's
figure which is 1-1-41 we get the remainder 9-11-57. This
represents the sign Capricorn. In March 1969 Jupiter would
transit the triangular sign of Virgo. Saturn would be in his
debilitation sign of Aries which being the twelfth sign from
the Moon heralds the beginning of sadesati.
Education.—This has to be judged from the entire
horoscope and the 4th house is only indicative of the
academical distinction that is likely to be attained by the
native. The 2nd house also indicates Vidya or learning and
the 3rd house denotes cleverness or mental characteristics.
The 5th house indicates the real learning or wisdom of the
native. Here Mercury is also the Atma-karaka. The lord of
the 4th house is with a benefic and in Vargottamamsa, as
well as aspected by Jupiter. Mars, the lord of the 4th from
the Moon in the Navamsa is with Mercury and therefore
also aspected by Jupiter. The
